'''âh-j-r-d''' ('''kahajredoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jack|jack]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-j-r-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jack|jack]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âh-j-r-d
|-
! Lemma
| kahajredoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihajredoko|thihajredoko]] || [[word:jihajredoko|jihajredoko]] || [[word:shihajredoko|shihajredoko]] || [[word:kihajredoko|kihajredoko]]
|-

|-
